snippet.title: [URDU] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | Day 1 | PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1
snippet.description:
The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Main Event reaches its peak with the Grand Finals. 1,000,000+ players across the globe wanted to be on this stage. only a handful of them have shown they are more skillful than the rest. 16 teams, two days, one champion. Every squad on that roster has earned their seat the hard way. No soft paths, no charity. Just the best of the best fighting for the right to call themselves champions.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage :
• 32 teams split into 2 groups of 16
• 2 days total (1 day per group)
• Overall Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Overall Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage : 
• Overall Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH Rule)
• 16 teams — 2 days, 6 matches per day

🔥 SMASH RULE ( On Day 2) 
SMASH Rule is the most exciting way to claim the trophy but how do you do it? Here is how : 

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

🗓 Tournament Schedule: 

Group Stage: June 2–3
Survival Stage: June 4
Grand Finals: June 6–7

snippet.title: Asim Azhar - Tu Hai Wohi (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Some people feel impossible to forget.

Tu Hai Wohi is Asim Azhar’s contemporary recreation of a timeless melody, blending nostalgia with modern pop and R&B emotion. Built around the unforgettable essence of Kishore Kumar’s original vocal sample and R. D. Burman’s iconic composition, the song captures the ache of waiting, searching, and holding on to a love that still feels unfinished.

🎶 Listen / Stream on your favorite platform:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3hrvVVBKL6jfpqGzR2WSlH?si=ad874df466264893
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=AY2er0k_p4U&si=M0YB2QsXdPugThDV
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/song/tu-hai-wohi/6775789868


Audio Credits - 
Written by : Asim Azhar 
Composed by : Asim Azhar
Original Composition by : R. D. Burman
Original Lyrics by : Gulshan Bawra
Produced by : Zain Ali Zeeshan, Asim Azhar, Haider Ali
Recording Engineer by : Kumail Abbas 
Mixed & Mastered by : Akash Shravan

Video Credits - 
Directed by : Mohammad Mohtashim

Studio : Shahmsi Studio

Lyrics:
Janay kahan hai
Kahan phir rahi
Main dhoondhoun
Tera jo guzar ho kahin
Tu ne hi waada kia tha jo kal
Main bhutka phiroun sarkoun pe hi
Kahan ho meri jaan
Aisay na sataa
You know I can’t wait
Peechay na bhaga
Kya chahti hai ab tu
Khul k tou bata
Please communicate
Betha idher aas mein main teri kiunk
Tu … tu hai wohi
Dil ne jisay apna kaha
Jaan-e-jahaan main hun yahan
Tu hai kahan…Tu hai kahan
Tu … tu hai wohi
Dil ne jisay apna kaha
Jaan-e-jahaan main hun yahan
Tu hai kahan…Tu hai kahan
Pakki baat hai?
Maaf kerde tu samjhay ghalat
I don’t lemme
I’m just stupidly nuts
Teri life hai, tu rockstar
Hum thehrein yahan bus alag
Tainu chahay di space
You think its a phase
Kar le tasalli per wekh
Juri, meri tere naal likhi hai
Duniya wi kehti hai
They fit together
Basically better
Birds of a feather
Sun k main yaad karoun
Dekho ye mehnut
Thori si zehmutt
Kya main call karoun
Tu busy with friends
I should understand
Full care koi baat na kahoun
Koshish karoun, kaisay na sochoun
Kahan ho meri jaan

Khul k tou bata

Jaan-e-jahaan main hun yahan

snippet.title: Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Na jawaab de…
na sawaal kar…
mujhe chhod de
mere haal par.

Tujhe kya milega
mujhe tod kar…
hum to pehle hi
andar se bikhar chuke hain.

Mohabbat ne
itna tanha kar diya…
ab kisi se
shikayat bhi nahi hoti.

“Mere Haal Par”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo dard me bhi
khamoshi se jeena seekh gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

mujhe chhod do
mere haal par…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein sirf dard mila ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

About:
Raakh is a haunting crime investigation that begins with the disappearance and murder of two teenagers in Delhi. Set in 1978, when such brutality was rare and shocking, the series follows the relentless manhunt launched to track down the killers while exploring the disturbing psyche of the men behind the crime.

Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices.
